query_title: Comedy Central Roast of James Franco

recommendations.title: Comedy Central Roast of Justin Bieber
recommendations.overview: Several roasters, and the master himself Kevin Hart, make fun of Justin Bieber.

recommendations.title: Ellen DeGeneres: Relatable
recommendations.overview: In her first special since 2003, Ellen revisits her road to stardom and details the heartfelt -- and hilarious -- lessons she's learned along the way.

recommendations.title: Chris Rock: Selective Outrage
recommendations.overview: Chris Rock delivers an electric stand-up set on non-racist yoga pants, spoiling his kids, the Kardashians and his thoughts on the Will Smith fiasco.

recommendations.title: Not Another Teen Movie
recommendations.overview: On a bet, a gridiron hero at John Hughes High School sets out to turn a bespectacled plain Jane into a beautiful and popular prom queen in this outrageous send-up of the teen movies of the 1980s and '90s.

recommendations.title: Good Fortune
recommendations.overview: A well-meaning but rather inept angel named Gabriel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy capitalist.

recommendations.title: Aziz Ansari: Live at Madison Square Garden
recommendations.overview: Ansari headlines the iconic Madison Square Garden and delivers his most hilarious and insightful stand-up yet. Filmed in front of a sold-out audience, Ansari's latest special is an uproarious document of the comic in top form -- covering topics rangi

recommendations.title: Merry Christmas, Drake & Josh
recommendations.overview: Step brothers Drake and Josh must give a foster family the best Christmas ever or face years in jail for a Christmas party gone wrong.

recommendations.title: Franco Escamilla: bienvenido al mundo
recommendations.overview: Comedian Franco Escamilla shares stories about parenting his children when they get into trouble, with reflections on gender, friendship and romance.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: Kid Gorgeous at Radio City
recommendations.overview: John Mulaney relays stories from his childhood and "SNL," eviscerates the value of college and laments getting older in this electric comedy special.

recommendations.title: Aziz Ansari: Right Now
recommendations.overview: In a comedy special directed by Spike Jonze, Aziz Ansari shares deep personal insights and hilarious takes on wokeness, family and the social climate.
